Authoring Example

AutoTypeTable still needs extracted type data from the route or conversion pipeline. This demo renders that extracted output on /docs . Quickstart route External reference 1. Author MDX Start with semantic components such as Callout , Tabs , Cards , and TypeTable . 2. Render in TanStack Start Import the .mdx file directly and provide mdxComponents through the shared runtime map. 3. Validate separately Keep AutoTypeTable in pipeline coverage where source extraction actually happens. Package manager Command -- -- npm npx pm add @inth/docs pnpm pnpm dlx pm add @inth/docs yarn yarn dlx pm add @inth/docs bun bunx pm add @inth/docs Overview This tabset proves the package adapters hydrate correctly inside the demo app. Tables TypeTable is safe to render live because all of its data is already present in the MDX payload. Pipeline note AutoTypeTable is not shown live here because extraction depends on a stable build-time file system base path. Property Type Description Default Required -- -- -- -- -- command string Command template with a \ pm placeholder. - ✅ Required commands Record\<PackageManager, string Explicit per-manager overrides when templates are not enough.

Quickstart

Install and run your first command.

Quickstart

1. Install Install the package. 2. Import Import convertAllMdx from @inth/docs/convert . 3. Build Run bun run pipeline build . Package manager Command -- -- npm npx pm install @inth/docs pnpm pnpm dlx pm install @inth/docs yarn yarn dlx pm install @inth/docs bun bunx pm install @inth/docs Overview Basic usage is one call to convertAllMdx srcDir, outDir, remarkPlugins . Advanced Pass custom remark plugins alongside defaultRemarkPlugins for extensions and set a stable basePath when AutoTypeTable needs to resolve project files.

Search and AI Answers

Generate a local docs search index and stream source-grounded AI answers.

Search and AI Answers

@inth/docs includes headless search logic for docs sites that want to bring their own UI. ℹ️ Info Demo route Open the live search example at /search. Typing runs local search only; the Ask button is the only action that can call the model.

Search and AI Answers

Generate a local docs search index and stream source-grounded AI answers.

Search and AI Answers

Package Surfaces

Property Type Description Default Required -- -- -- -- -- @inth/docs/search runtime Edge-safe search, answer context, query validation, JSON body limits, and rate limiter helpers. - ✅ Required @inth/docs/search/node build time Node-only \ generateSearchIndex\ helper that reads converted markdown and writes \ docs/search-index.json\ . - ✅ Required @inth/docs/search/ai runtime Vercel AI SDK \ streamText\ wrapper for source-grounded plain text answer streams. - Optional @inth/docs/search/bash runtime Optional \ just-bash\ and \ bash-tool\ adapter for agent-style docs inspection. - Optional

Search and AI Answers

Generate a local docs search index and stream source-grounded AI answers.

Search and AI Answers

Build the Index

Run conversion first, then generate the search index from markdown The generated files are static JSON. In the demo app, scripts/search-generate.ts copies docs-search-index.json and docs-search-content.json into src/generated so routes can import them without reading from the file system at request time.

```ts import { generateSearchIndex } from "@inth/docs/search/node"; await generateSearchIndex({ outDir: "public", baseUrl: "https://docs.example.com", }); ```

Search and AI Answers

Generate a local docs search index and stream source-grounded AI answers.

Search and AI Answers

Runtime Search

Import the generated JSON and query it from your own route handler Search results include urlWithHash and absoluteUrlWithHash so the UI can link directly to the matched heading. The demo renders matching heading id s with slugifyDocsHeading . The generated index separates compact search metadata from source content. Search uses tuple records and numeric chunk postings, while answer generation reads the relevant heading chunks from the content store. listDocsContentFiles , readDocsContentFile , and readDocsContentChunk expose that store as a lightweight virtual docs filesystem for closed-source UIs or custom agents.

```ts import { readDocsContentFile, searchDocs, type DocsSearchContentStore, type DocsSearchIndex, } from "@inth/docs/search"; import contentJson from "./generated/docs-search-content.json"; import indexJson from "./generated/docs-search-index.json"; const index = indexJson as DocsSearchIndex; const content = contentJson as DocsSearchContentStore; const results = searchDocs(index, "package tabs", { content }); const file = readDocsContentFile( index, "guides/quickstart", content ); ```

Search and AI Answers

Generate a local docs search index and stream source-grounded AI answers.

Search and AI Answers

AI Answers

Use streamDocsAnswer when you want a simple Vercel AI SDK integration The answer prompt only includes retrieved docs context, tells the model to cite sources, and asks it to say when the docs do not contain enough context.

```ts import { streamDocsAnswer } from "@inth/docs/search/ai"; const { response } = streamDocsAnswer({ index, content, query, model: process.env.DOCS_SEARCH_MODEL ?? "moonshotai/kimi-k2.6", productName: "@inth/docs", }); ```

Search and AI Answers

Generate a local docs search index and stream source-grounded AI answers.

Search and AI Answers

Agent Inspection

Use the optional bash adapter when an AI SDK agent should inspect the docs through shell commands The adapter creates a read-only /docs filesystem for just-bash and wraps it with bash-tool . Agents can use ls , cat , find , grep , and rg ; network commands, Python, JavaScript execution, and filesystem writes are disabled by default.

```ts import { createDocsBashTool } from "@inth/docs/search/bash"; const { tools, instructions } = await createDocsBashTool(index, content); ```

Search and AI Answers

Generate a local docs search index and stream source-grounded AI answers.

Search and AI Answers

Abuse Protection

1. Search is cheap Debounced typing should call only the local /api/docs/search route. It does not call the model. 2. Answers are explicit Keep model calls behind a button such as Ask , Enter to ask , or Cmd+Enter . 3. Limit request paths Use validateDocsQuery , readJsonWithLimit , getClientIdentifier , and a RateLimiter implementation around public routes. The demo uses an in-memory limiter for local smoke coverage. Production apps should adapt the same RateLimiter interface to a shared store such as Redis, Vercel KV, Cloudflare KV, or Durable Objects.

Search and AI Answers

Generate a local docs search index and stream source-grounded AI answers.

Search and AI Answers

Long-Term Scale

Keep this lexical index for exact API names, configuration keys, paths, and errors. As docs grow, use the content-file helpers as the durable page/chunk access layer, then add embeddings or hosted search only when users need fuzzy semantic recall that does not share vocabulary with the docs.
